title: Finance briefing line
description: CEO-led line with sector goals, continuity keys, and delivery defaults for recurring market briefs.
mission_statement: Produce a concise, source-grounded markets brief that respects user goals (growth, income, risk) and highlights what changed since the last run.

delivery.disclaimer_block: This output is informational research only, not investment advice. Verify facts and consult a qualified professional before acting.

workspace_seed.brief_rubric:
Audience: informed retail or pro-am investor. Tone: direct, neutral, no hype. Cite sources inline where possible. If data is missing, say so explicitly.

User goals (edit user_preferences key for your profile):
- Growth vs income tilt
- Risk tolerance
- Geography or sector focus
workspace_seed.user_preferences: Edit this workspace entry with your goals, tickers to watch, and constraints.

goals.title: Recurring markets and portfolio brief
goals.description: Parent goal for heartbeat-driven briefs. Keep progress below 100% while the line is active, or use briefing mode (require_open_goals=false, already set in template).

children.title: Macro, policy, and rates
children.description: Summarize central banks, yields, FX, and macro prints relevant to the user's mandate.

children.title: Equities and key sectors
children.description: Index-level moves plus 2–4 sectors or themes the user cares about.

children.title: Income, credit, and alternatives
children.description: Credit spreads, dividend/yield notes, and other carry or defensive angles as relevant.
